title: snowfault
description: a wintery and snowy look for minecraft!
body:
![youtube thumnail for snowfault 16x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f987b41505372773c126275fa8fd3a813fb6eb4_0.webp)

# now available in 1.21+!
___
### pack updates
updates to this pack will be made sparingly because i am actively working on other projects. i may consider future updates if the demand is there. please note that some textures will be missing for high version due to the sheer amount of minecraft updates that have been released since this pack's release
___
### recommended mods
use [skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify) and [polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone?version=1.21.11&loader=fabric) for the best experience - this pack has custom colors and skies
___
### notes
[see original pack video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DCFDBly4sA0&feature=youtu.be) (1.8.9)
___
### disclaimers
this pack only supports skyboxes for skyboxify at the moment. there is no plan to add skyboxes for other mods at the moment.
___
### questions?
join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/FkqYUUu) if you run into any issues, have feedback/suggestions, or simply want to say hi!
